reasoning: The icon_echo_box_v00 composited as a warm golden/yellow pixel-art box entity at center-scene. Color contrast against both the dark red-tinged tiles (left) and dark teal grid (right) is good — warm gold reads clearly against cool backgrounds. Silhouette is a recognizable box shape with decorative details, consistent with the game's pixel art vocabulary. Style feels native rather than pasted. Main weaknesses: the entity occupies a relatively small footprint on screen, which could slow spotting to ~0.7s rather than 0.5s; the position at a tile boundary creates minor edge-blending. No confusion with other entities — the dark creature entity in upper-left is visually distinct. Echoes-cleanliness is acceptable but saturation/brightness could be pushed slightly higher for the bright uncluttered Echoes feel. Overall well-integrated but just short of clean pass threshold.
